ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sector ID */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry within the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "price" REAL /* Current stock price of the company */,
  "earnings_per_share" REAL /* Earnings per share of the company */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid per share by the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Company headquarters location */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user role ID */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of stock transacted */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of transaction */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time of transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (above/below) */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company for which the price is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company making the dividend payment */,
  "date_paid" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend payments (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings call entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company for which the earnings call is recorded */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date of the earnings call */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* Transcript of the earnings call */,
  "presentation" TEXT /* Link to the presentation slides */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_calls_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being tracked */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the company was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_insiders" (
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company insider */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company for which the insider is associated */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the insider */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the insider (e.g., CEO, CFO) */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned by the insider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_insiders_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_holders" (
  "holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institutional holder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company for which the institution holds stocks */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institutional holder */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned by the institutional holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_holders_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
